name: rawgentic-memorypalace
description: Long-term memory plugin for Claude Code — MemPalace-powered storage with intelligent ingestion triggers, semantic search, and wake-up context.

mempalace.description: MemPalace MCP server. Requires mempalace to be importable from the Python on PATH. Simplest install: `pip install --user mempalace`. For isolated installs via pipx, add a user-level override via `claude mcp add -s user mempalace -- <pipx-venv>/bin/python -m mempalace.mcp_server`.
